comment: SEI; disable interrupts; start of reset handler
PPU ctrl: NMI off / 8x8 sprites / BG pattern table 1
VS. System register - coin/service I/O
Wait for 1st VBlank
Wait for 2nd VBlank
Set stack pointer to $7F (128-byte stack at $0100-$017F)
PPU ctrl: NMI enable / BG pattern 1 / sprite pattern 0
Main game loop (infinite)
Save A X Y P on stack
Force rendering on during NMI
Write OAM base address $02xx
Trigger OAM DMA from page $02
Increment frame counter low byte (ZP $0B)
Increment frame counter high byte (ZP $0A)
DirToStateTable [18 bytes]: idx=dy_sign01*3+dx_sign01; [0..8]=prefer-Y states; [9..17]=prefer-X states (applied +9 for enemy RNG or player fire)
CalcDirToTarget: sign(TargetX-EntityX)+1->$64; sign(TargetY-EntityY)+1->$65; idx=$65*3+$64 (0..8)
idx formula: A=$65*3+$64; enemy uses RNG to pick +9(X-prefer); player uses fire-btn bit
Enemy: 50% chance use X-preferred table (idx+9); else Y-preferred
BulletExplode helper: encodes dir into tile offset; adjusts X by -5; calls DrawEntityTile
StageLoader: loads level-init ptr ($8000[stage]) via JmpThruPtr0 when $30!=0; else uses $801A outer table + SubStageIdx ($42)
StageLoader sub-stage dispatch: outer ptr=$801A[stage*2]; Y=SubStageIdx-1; inner table ptr[Y*2] called via JmpThruPtr0; first call (Y<0) goes to one-time init at $871C
StageLoader first-time init: JSR $98E0/$98BE; zero ZP $68-$EF; ORA stage flags from $80B6; call $97B1 (palette/init)
EnemyTypeTable[40]: Y=(GameSpeed-1)*4+slot; maps 4 enemy type slots to EntityType bytes; $80=Basic/$A0=Fast/$C0=Power/$E0=Armor; order shuffled per difficulty
Stage0 wave init: clear $0610-$062F (32B); clear ZP $5C-$67 (12B); STA $44=$5F=1; STA $FD=$80; enable 4 APU channels ($4015=$0F)
Stage0 phase1: STA $43=$2E (set EnemyCount=46 sub-field)
Stage0 phase2: EnemyCount=$08; $D4=$2B/$D3=$A0; $68=1; X=$12=$66=2; configure entity 2 slot data
Stage0 phase3: $44=$40=$01; $42=$00 (reset SubStageIdx); init complete
EntitySlotFill3: $34=$30
column4: $FF=1; loop X=4..0 over entity slots; loads sprite ptr from $82FA/$8300/$82F4 and OAM base from $830C; calls $8DC4+$988C at X=4 and X=2; updates $D2/$D3/$0612/$43/$25; JMP $8B98

comment: EntitySlotFill4: clamp $6D index; select ptr pair ($8348/$834E if $5E=0 else $8354/$835A); copy 6-byte slot template to $0304-$0309 (fill zeros with $FE); copy $8312[0..3] to $0300-$0303; clear $030A; JMP $8B98
EntitySpriteSetup: LDA $82F4
column5: X->$04 (OAM offset); A=0; JMP $9811 (sprite tile draw)

comment: SlotSprPtrLo[6]: {$74
column8: $D0} sprite data ptr lo bytes per entity slot (ZP $00)

comment: SlotSprOffset[6]: {$4C
column8: $78} sprite source offset per slot; used as ZP $01 and $D3

comment: SlotSprPtrHi[6]: {$90
column8: $A2} ptr high bytes per slot; combined with $82FA -> bank-0 sprite addresses

comment: SlotEntityType[6]: {$02
column8: $00} entity type params per slot; $02=enemy type 2

comment: SlotOAMBase[6]: {$04
column8: $7C} OAM slot base offsets per entity (spaced $18=24 apart)

comment: WaveCtrlInit[4]: {$09
column6: $06} 4 wave control values copied to $0300-$0303 at stage init

comment: SlotDataPtrALo[6]: {$60
column8: $7E} low bytes of EntitySlotData block ptrs (set A

comment: SlotDataPtrAHi[6]: {all $83} high bytes for set A ptrs -> $8360
SlotDataPtrBLo[6]: {$84
column8: $7E} low bytes of EntitySlotData block ptrs (set B)

comment: SlotDataPtrBHi[6]: {all $83} high bytes for set B ptrs -> $8384
SlotDataBlocksA: 6x6-byte entity slot templates (set A
SlotDataBlocksB: 6x6-byte entity slot templates (set B
StageNumLUT[6]: {$00
column8: $01} indexed by Y (game state 0..5) -> stage number -> $41 (StageNum)

comment: StageTransitionHelper: JSR $D715; copy $03F0[0..5]->$0620[0..5]; INC $41; clear $40
EntityAnimLoop: X=2->1; DEC $80
EntitySpriteLayout: OAM layout for entity X; reads $A82A
column5: Y (attr); calls $9811; Y=$16 special case (+$0C/$08 offsets); checks $0E visibility

comment: EntityAnimContinue: Y=$05 loop; $03C8
EagleStateUpdate: exit if $68=0 or neg; DEC $68; x=$68>>2; Y=2Ă—||(x-5)|-5|; JMP via EagleHandlerTable (39-frame animation)
EagleHandlerTable[6]: Y=0â†’NullHandler($DC9E); Y=2â†’EagleExplosion1(tile$F1); Y=4â†’EagleExplosion2(tile$F5); Y=6â†’EagleExplosion3(tile$F9); Y=8â†’EagleDrawIntact; Y=10â†’EagleDrawDamaged
Eagle bullet hit: if $68â‰ 0 set $68=$27 (start 39-frame destruction timer); $030B=$0307=1; STA $CC
$68=$80 = GameActive flag set at level start; same ZP used as eagle destruction countdown (1..$7F) and game-over check (0)
LivesGrantCheck: if $68=$80 (game active) and P1 score-tier $17â‰Ą2 or extra-life flag $66â‰Ą1: INC $51(P1Lives)+INC $66; same for P2 ($83/$52/$67); sets $0304=$0305=1 (trigger HUD update)
LevelScreenInit: wait VBlank
HQSpriteInit: set $00/$01=$2356(PPU nametable dst); $02/$03=$0400(RAM src); $0400=$17 $0402=$0405=$FB; copy $0409-$040Fâ†’$0401-$0407; JMP BuildPPUWriteQueue($992E)

BuildPPUWriteQueue: read byte from ($02)[Y]; lo-nibble=row_count; hi-nibble=col_count; write PPU-addr-hi/lo + tile data to $0301+ cmd buffer; advance src by $20 per column group; terminates with $00 sentinel
CalcSpeedTiers: X=3..0; compute speed tier 5..0 for each entity from $B0
FormationDataLoad: X=3..0; for each entity slot read 4 bytes from current stage source via ptr $03/$C0

VS System coin/service input handler: double-read $4016 (glitch filter); route bit to $4020 (VS protection); AND #$24 (bits 2&5=coin/service buttons); on press INC $4A (CoinHeldCounter); on release INC $4B (credits counter) + $0300=1 (coin event flag) + clear $4A
ClearKillTallies: loop X=7..0; STA $73
column4: X=#$00; zeros ZP $73-$7A (8 kill-tally bytes used for per-type enemy kill counts in score tally); called at LevelStart before DrawAllHUDKillIcons

comment: HUDTankAnimation: $0108=enemies-remaining display count (DEC every 16 frames via FrameLo&$0F); when $0108â‰Ą$0A: apply D2C6[Y]/D2CA[Y] delta to $0105/$0106 (X/Y position)
column4: Y=$0107 (dir index); call DrawHUDTanks; when $0108=0 set $0106=$F0 (hide sprite)

comment: HUDTankWiggleX[4]: signed X deltas for HUD tank arrival animation; {0
HUDTankWiggleY[4]: signed Y deltas for HUD tank arrival animation; {-1
DrawNametableTile(A=tile_type 0-15
column5: Y=pixel_y): divides coords by 8 via D733; palette from DB69[type]; 4 CHR tiles from DB79[type*4]; writes 2x2 metatile to nametable+attribute; tile $0F=open ground

comment: PixelToTileCoord: converts X and Y pixel coords (each 3xLSR /8) to tile indices; returns X=tileX Y=tileY
TileAttrTable[16]: palette slot (0-3) per metatile type; types 0-4=pal0(open/brick)
TileCHRTable[16*4]: 4 CHR tile IDs (TL TR BL BR) per 2x2 metatile type; tile $0F=open ground (all zeros)
$60=$30: GameState=StageStart â€” set by PreLoop/StageStartDraw before showing STAGE XX banner; cleared to $00 once banner display finishes

CoinScreen: display credits ($4B) each VBlank; wait for P1 fire (bit2 of $08) or P2 fire (bit2 of $09); on press: PLA PLA (discard JSR return) + dispatch via JMP($0011) to TwoPlayerStart/OnePlayerStart
NewGameInit: ZeroSlot at $15
column4: $1D; clear $0101-$0102; STA $4C=0 (GameSessionActive=cleared); reads $4016 AND $10 for 5-life vs 3-life DIP; sets P1/P2 lives; clears $46(PlayerCount)

comment: $4C=1: GameSessionActive set at LevelStart â€” paired with $68=$80; cleared only by NewGameInit($C272); checked at $C0E8 to decide game restart path
StageStartDraw: post-game-over stage banner setup; WaitNMI; NametableId=$24; WriteNametable; Init2; $60=$30; draw stage/player-count sprites; same sequence as PreLoop stage-start section
attract mode
SoundResetInit: STA $4015=$0F (enable sq1/sq2/tri/noise) + STA $4017=$C0 (5-step frame IRQ-inhibit); zero 28 slots in $031C-$03F3 (stride 8 via $F0/$F1) and counters $0300-$031B
SoundEngine: per-frame APU driver; 28 sound slots at $031C+; ZP $F0/$F1=slot-ptr $F4=idx $F5=limit $F9-$FC=active; writes 4 regs via STA $4000
SoundAPUWrite: STA $4000
column4: X â€” write APU register; X=channel_base (0=sq1 4=sq2 8=tri 12=noise); 4-byte write loop from sequence data

comment: SoundChSilence: mute channel: write ((ch_idx<<2)&$10)^$10 to $4000+ch_base (clears duty/volume bit4 = volume 0)
SoundSeqPtrLoad: load ptr for slot $F4 from $EEA3 table (2-byte LE) into ZP $F2/$F3
SoundSeqReadByte: read byte from sequence at ($F2)
column4: Y; advance offset at ($F0)+5; return in A

comment: SoundSeqPtrTable: 14x2-byte LE ptrs to sound sequence data; indexed by channel/slot id
LevelTileLoader: reads nibbles from ($13)
column4: Y (ptr into $F27D+offset); hi/lo nibble alternating; calls DrawNametableTile($D82B) per 16x16 metatile; 13x13 grid X=$10-$D0 Y=$10-$D0

comment: LevelMapData: 35 stages x 91 bytes; nibble-packed 13x13 metatile grids; 14 nibbles/row (13+1 skip) 13 rows; types 0-15 (4=brick 9=steel 10=trees 11=water 12=ice 13-15=empty)
AttractWait: NametableId=$24; INC $4F each frame; call BlinkTitleSprite; exit on $4B!=0 (credits) or $4F=$F0 (240 frames); credits: PLA PLA JMP $C0BB
BlinkTitleSprite: JSR WaitVBlank; test $0B&$20 (frame bit 5 ~1Hz); if set ptr=$D1A7 else ptr=$D1BA; DrawSprites(X=7 Y=$12)

PreGameDraw: WaitNMI+ClearSpriteBuf; NametableId=$24; draw nametable blocks; $D7D4+Init2; $60=$30(stage banner); draw STAGE-XX sprite col$02/row$03; draw number; 2P indicator if $83!=0; $60=$00; draw border sprites
SoundOff: STA $4015=$00 (disable all APU channels); STA $5D=$5E=$5F=0; STA $0614=$0F
SoundReset: entry point; LDA #$00 then falls into SoundOff sequence

StageClearTallyScreen: called from $C1F5 after all enemies killed; JSR TallyScreenInit($CD04); sum P1 kills $73-$76â†’$7D P2 kills $77-$7Aâ†’$7E; per-type loop $5A=0-3: load KillScoreTable score SetScoreWeight; drain P1 tally DEC $73
column4: X INC $5D + ScoreAdd; drain P2 tally DEC $77
column5: X INC $5E + ScoreAdd; draw counts via BCD_Div+DrawNametableWithOffset; repeat until no kills; INC $5A loop 4 types; draw totals; 2P bonus to winner; wait 100 frames RTS

comment: TallyScreenInit: WaitVBlank; set $6B=1
column7: $60=$30; SetGamePalette; WaitNMI+ClearSpriteBuf; TallyInitNametable; WriteNametable+Init2; draw P1 header sprite ($D173 at col$08 row$03); draw stage number via BCD_Div; draw 4 tank-type icon rows (sprite ptrs $D17C/$D18B at rows $07/$0C/$0F/$12/$15); if 2P($83!=0) draw P2 header+4 more icon rows

comment: KillScoreTable: 4 bytes nibble-BCD score per tank type: $10=100pts(basic) $20=200pts(fast) $30=300pts(power) $40=400pts(armor); used by SetScoreWeight($DA62) during tally
DelayXFrames: loop X times: WaitVBlank+TallyScreenRowAnim($CEC4); used during tally to pace per-type counting (X=$19=25 initial wait X=$12=18 between types X=$07=7 X=$0D=13)
SetScoreWeight: A=nibble-BCD value; ZeroSlot at $35; A!=0: $3A=A>>4(hi tens) $3B=A&$0F(lo units); A==0: $38=1(free tank flag)
ScoreAdd: X=player slot (2=P1
column4: 3=P2); scale X*8+6; 7-digit BCD add $35-$3B into score digits $15
column6: X with carry propagation; if overflow set digits $17..$1A to 9

comment: ZP_P1KillTally: 4 bytes $73-$76 = P1 kill counts by tank type (0=basic 1=fast 2=power 3=armor); set by INC $73
column4: X at $E9B3; summed into $7D at tally; cleared by ClearKillTallies($C625) at LevelStart

comment: ZP_P2KillTally: 4 bytes $77-$7A = P2 kill counts by tank type; set by INC $77
column4: X at $E9B8; summed into $7E; cleared same as P1
